name: Thai Wah Public Company Limited
summary: Thai Wah Public Company Limited manufactures and distributes starch and other agricultural products in Thailand, Vietnam, Cambodia, and China. Its products include tapioca starch, which is used in the food industry, such as seasoning powder and sweetener products, as well as in other industries, such as paper and textile; tapioca pearl that is used in cooking savory dishes and desserts; alpha starch, which is used in the aquatic animal feed, mosquito repellent, and metal casting industries; and glucose and candy products. The company also provides vermicelli, bean vermicelli, rice vermicelli, rice flour, roselle flower, pandanus leaf, and other products. In addition, it is also involved in land holding activities; and generation and sale of electricity; and wholesale trading of tapioca starch products, rice flour products, and other starch-related products. Thai Wah Public Company Limited was founded in 1947 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
